---
title: "Team"
description: "Students and researchers I advise and mentor."
---

## Current Members

### PhD Students

- **Rishika Kohli** (2025 – present) <br> 
  *Topic:* AI for Security, LLM Compression\
  *Advised by* Profs. [Manoj S. Gaur](https://iitjammu.ac.in/computer_science_engineering/faculty-list/~manojsinghgaur) and [Shaifu Gupta](https://iitjammu.ac.in/computer_science_engineering/faculty-list/~shaifugupta) (Dept. of CSE, IIT Jammu)

### Undergraduates

- **Apratim Mishra** (2026 – present)<br> 
  *Topic:* Applications of Neural Tangent Kernel\
  *Jointly with* Prof. [Manoj S. Gaur](https://iitjammu.ac.in/computer_science_engineering/faculty-list/~manojsinghgaur)



## Alumni

### Masters Students

- **Snehashish Ghosh** (2025 – 2026) <br> 
  *Topic:* Neural Operator Learning for PDEs\
  *Jointly with* [Prof. Jyothsna Rani Komaragiri](https://chep.iisc.ac.in/Personnel/pages/jyothsna/index.html) (Center for High Energy Physics, IISc)\
  *Current position:* AI/ML Engineer II, Astreya
